name: Rent Manager Property Management API
what_it_does: Rent Manager REST API for property management software targeting residential and commercial property portfolios. Enables AI agents to manage tenant and lease data retrieval for portfolio administration, handle accounting and financial transaction data access for property financials, access maintenance request and service ticket management for property operations, retrieve prospect and leasing pipeline data for vacancy management, manage utility billing and RUBS (Ratio Utility Billing System) calculation data, handle owner statement and investor reporting data generation, access inspection and move-in/move-out data management, retrieve charge and payment transaction history for accounts receivable, manage work order and vendor payment data for property accounting, and integrate property management data with accounting, maintenance, and reporting platforms.
use_cases: Retrieving tenant and lease data from portfolio management agents
Tracking maintenance work orders from operations automation agents
Generating owner financial statements from investor reporting agents
Managing utility billing from property accounting agents
not_for: Single-family residential without mixed residential/commercial portfolio needs
Large institutional REIT without small-to-mid PM company focus
New proptech entrant without established property management workflows
best_when: A residential or mixed property management company using Rent Manager wants AI agents to automate tenant management, maintenance coordination, financial reporting, and utility billing.
avoid_when: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant financial data, payment history, and screening information requires FCRA and state landlord-tenant law compliance. Automated eviction and late fee workflows must follow jurisdiction-specific legal requirements. Tenant data handling must comply with applicable CCPA and privacy laws.

auth.notes: Rent Manager uses API key authentication. Per-account credentials. API documentation at help.rentmanager.com. Webhooks for event notifications. REST API with JSON. London, Ohio HQ (LSSI). On-premise and cloud deployment options. Strong in affordable housing and mixed portfolio management. Mature product with established API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription per unit
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit monthly pricing; minimum seat fees
pricing.notes: London, Ohio. Founded 1992. Private (LSSI). Residential and commercial property management. Mature product with strong accounting capabilities. Affordable housing (HUD, Section 8) specialization. On-premise option unlike newer cloud-native competitors. Competes with Buildium and AppFolio for property management software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in help center

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY RISK: Tenant screening and financial data requires FCRA compliance; automated data processing needs permissible purpose documentation
On-premise option — some Rent Manager deployments are on-premise; API endpoint and access pattern differs from cloud deployment
Affordable housing compliance — Rent Manager's HUD and Section 8 functionality has regulatory compliance requirements; automated affordable housing workflows require compliance validation
RUBS billing complexity — Ratio Utility Billing System calculations have unit-specific rules; validate RUBS methodology before automated utility billing
On-premise data residency — on-premise deployments have different data access patterns; cloud API documentation may not apply to on-premise deployments
Accounting integration — Rent Manager has robust accounting module; avoid duplicate accounting entries by coordinating with native accounting workflows before automation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Residential and commercial property management. SOC2. API key. US. Tenant financial and personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key. US. Tenant and financial data.
